diagrams.title: Cloud Service Models Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the three cloud service models with user and provider responsibilities
elements: IaaS at bottom: User manages OS, apps, data; Provider manages physical hardware
PaaS in middle: User manages apps, data; Provider manages OS, runtime, middleware
SaaS at top: Provider manages everything; User just uses the application
diagrams.purpose: Understanding responsibility distribution in cloud computing

diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how hypervisor creates virtual machines on physical hardware
elements: Each VM contains: Guest OS, Applications, Virtual Resources (CPU, RAM, Storage)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtualization enables multiple operating systems on single hardware

diagrams.title: Client-Server Architecture
diagrams.description: Network model showing clients requesting services from centralized server
elements: Central Server with: Web Server, Database Server, File Server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding resource sharing in network environments

diagrams.title: Distributed Computing System
diagrams.description: Multiple computers working together as single system
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how distributed systems appear as unified computing environment
